name: Black Bean Chili with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beef in a 2- to 3-quart saucepan over medium heat, stirring until it crumbles.
2. Add all ingredients except the rice to the pan.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer uncovered for 20 to 25 minutes.
4. Remove the bay leaves from the chili.
5. Serve the chili hot over cooked rice, with chips on the side.
